summary: W898 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while removing W897's explicit endpoint forgetful homology-preservation input. The W519 mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding provider now supplies that field through W856, and the resulting W898 leaves feed W897, then W895 through W879. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W898 derives W897 endpoint forgetful homology preservation from the W519 closed-embedding provider, but the remaining W898 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.
W898 is still a closed-embedding branch route. The W896 closed-map branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W898 fields are WPP right-open boundary data, WPP source-pi-zero boundary data, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-embedding components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, triangulated/source-side data, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/epi facts, and bounded homotopy localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-seven W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free explicit field inputs.

Apply the same W856 endpoint homology reduction to the closed-map branch if it is the next smallest supported branch improvement, or continue splitting a shared provider boundary only when current Lean definitions justify it.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
